# checkaivisible.com
> CheckAIVisible publishes which businesses ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity actually recommend in each category — refreshed weekly, with the source citations — plus a free tool to check how ready any website is to be read and cited by AI answer engines.

## What this site is
- Public **leaderboards** of who AI recommends per category (e.g. best CRM, best AI coding assistant), built by asking ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity the same question five times each, every week.
- A free **AI-readiness checker**: enter a domain and get an on-page AEO/SEO/GEO score with the exact gaps holding it back.
- Transparent method: appearance rates, weekly deltas and the engines' own citations are all published. **Placement is never for sale.**

## Main sections
- [Home](https://checkaivisible.com/): What AI recommends, plus the free visibility checker.
- [All leaderboards](https://checkaivisible.com/leaderboards): The full, searchable index of category ledgers, grouped by theme.
- [Docs / method](https://checkaivisible.com/docs): How the rankings and the AI-readiness score are calculated.

## Example leaderboards
- [Best CRM](https://checkaivisible.com/best-crm)
- [Best AI coding assistant](https://checkaivisible.com/best-ai-coding-assistant)
- [Best email marketing tool](https://checkaivisible.com/best-email-marketing)
- [Best project management software](https://checkaivisible.com/best-project-management)
- [Best note-taking app](https://checkaivisible.com/best-note-taking-app)

## How the leaderboards are built
- Each category is asked as a natural question (e.g. "What is the best CRM?").
- Every question is sampled **5 times per engine** across ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity — a single run would be noise.
- Mentions are fuzzy-matched and canonicalized to real businesses; the score is how often a business is named across runs and engines.
- The citation each engine points to is kept and shown, so every ranking is traceable.
- Ledgers refresh on a cadence earned by volatility (hot categories more often, stable ones less).

## How the AI-readiness checker works
- It fetches a page the way an AI crawler does (raw HTML, no JavaScript) plus robots.txt, sitemap.xml and llms.txt.
- It scores 7 pillars: AI crawlability, rendering/content availability, structured data (Schema.org), answer-engine optimization, authority/trust (E-E-A-T), performance and SEO fundamentals.
- It returns an overall score, an AI-specific sub-score, a tier, and a prioritized list of what to fix. No login required.

## Key facts
- AI answer engines (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity) increasingly recommend specific businesses by name when people ask for the "best" option in a category.
- Many sites are never read correctly by these engines because their content loads via JavaScript or lacks structured data — the checker measures exactly that.
- CheckAIVisible never sells placement on any leaderboard; a paid spot would make a trust ranking worthless.
